name: Christmas Cranberry Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cranberry and orange juices in a punch bowl.
2. Pour the carbonated beverage down the sides of the bowl.
3. Float whole cranberries on top.
Note: 1/2 cup - 51 calories, 1 fruit exchange, 13 grams carbohydrate, 0 protein, 0 fat, 3 mg sodium, 75 mg potassium, 0 mg cholesterol. Source: Am. Diabetes Association Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman (1986). Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93.
